name: glp1forum-mcp
description: Search & read glp1forum.com (a XenForo forum) with no API keys, via system curl.

tools.name: search_forum
tools.description: Full-text XenForo search with node/author/date/prefix filters.

tools.name: get_thread_images
tools.description: Download a thread's image attachments so vision can read image-only pricing/stock tables.

tools.name: list_threads
tools.description: Browse a forum section's threads by nodeId.

tools.name: list_forums
tools.description: List forum sections with their numeric node IDs.
